title: randia orophila
intro: Randia orophila, also known as the white-flowered Randia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Randia orophila have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Randia orophila include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potentially providing protection against certain diseases. Randia orophila can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it may also be used in topical applications for its medicinal properties.
